author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو حنيفة النعمان بن ثابت بن زوطي بن ماه
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Founding jurist of the Hanafi school of Islamic jurisprudence, one of the four major Sunni madhhabs.
author_identification.methodological_stance: Known for his reliance on ra'y (juristic opinion) alongside hadith in legal reasoning.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: This work is part of the Musnad collections, which compile hadiths according to the narrators, specifically those narrated by Abu Hanifa.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the earliest Musnad collections, significant for its role in preserving the hadith transmission chain of Abu Hanifa, a key figure in Islamic jurisprudence.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد الرحمن حسن محمود is a known editor of Islamic texts, though specific reputation details are not widely documented.
